data.name: Hentai Furry Panda
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Furry Panda — 以可愛熊貓女孩為主角的成人動漫益智遊戲



Hentai Furry Panda 是一款結合休閒益智玩法與可愛獸娘角色的成人遊戲。主角是一位迷人的熊貓女孩，擁有黑白相間的柔軟毛髮與俏皮可愛的氣質。


隨著遊戲進度推進，你將解鎖新的插畫，看到她不同的造型與姿態。


🔹 遊戲特色:


  • 記憶配對與拼圖兩種小遊戲

  • 解鎖新的插畫內容

  • 成就系統

  • 畫廊模式

  • 三種難度選擇


與可愛的熊貓女孩一起體驗輕鬆又有趣的益智遊戲。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Hentai Furry Panda
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Furry Panda — a charming anime puzzle game featuring a playful furry panda girl



Hentai Furry Panda is an adult anime puzzle game that combines relaxing gameplay, logic challenges, and adorable furry aesthetics. The main character is a cute and playful panda girl with soft black-and-white fur, expressive eyes, and an irresistible charm.


As you progress through the game, you will discover new illustrations of the panda heroine in different poses and outfits. Each completed challenge reveals more of her playful personality and captivating style.


🔹 Game Features:


  • Two mini-games in each stage:

    • A classic memory game — flip cards and find matching pairs.

    • A puzzle featuring the panda heroine unlocked after completing the memory challenge.

    • Completing both stages reveals a new illustration.

  • Progression rewards: unlock new images as you advance.

  • Extra content:

    • Achievements for players.

    • Gallery with unlocked images.

    • Three difficulty levels.


Relax, solve puzzles, and discover new illustrations in the playful world of Hentai Furry Panda.
